spec.rawSql:
select *, EXTRACT(DOW FROM CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kuala_Lumpur') = day_of_week as is_active 
from weekly_schedule order by day_of_week = 0 , day_of_week

with data as (select id, holiday_date, name, mode, enabled, true as can_edit from holiday_schedule
order by holiday_date)
select * from data
union all
select -1, '1900-01-01' as holiday_date, null as name, null as mode, null as enabled, false as can_edit
where not exists(select 1 from data)

select 'OFF' as value, 'OFF' as label
union select 'CUSTOM' as value, 'CUSTOM' as label
select key, value from control_params where key = 'schedule.start_time' or key = 'schedule.end_time'

options.defaultContent: The query didn't return any results.

spec.rawSql: select holiday_date, name from holiday_schedule where enabled = true and holiday_date>= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP and holiday_date <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + interval '2 months' order by holiday_date

with data as (select id, start_time, end_time, description, enabled, true as can_edit from schedule_event 
where start_time <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP and end_time > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
order by start_time, end_time)
select * from data
union all
select -1 as id, null as start_time, null as end_time, null as description, null as enabled, false as can_edit
where not exists(select 1 from data)
